should_trigger.prompt: Handle everything end-to-end — plan it, build it, verify it, review it, all in one go
Take this feature from plan through review automatically
I don't want to babysit this, just run the whole lifecycle hands-off
Autonomously implement this feature from start to finish without me stepping in

should_not_trigger.prompt: Just plan this feature, don't implement yet
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Handle the entire lifecycle for adding a search feature — planning, coding, testing, review
I want you to autonomously plan, implement, and review this without me intervening

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Create a detailed implementation plan for the search feature
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
